# Beyond RV AI Discovery Reference

This file summarises public, stable Beyond RV website content for AI assistants and search/discovery crawlers. It excludes admin URLs, customer data, API details, and private operational notes.

## Business identity

Beyond RV is a Queensland-based builder of slide-on campers, truck campers, off-road caravans, motorhome conversions, and expedition camper bodies. The workshop is located at 77 Coleyville Rd, Mutdapilly QLD 4307, about an hour south-west of Brisbane. Customers should book viewings by appointment.

Contact:
- Phone: +61 430 863 819
- Email: beyondcaravans@gmail.com
- Website: https://beyondrv.com.au/

Primary services:
- Slide-on campers for utes and trucks.
- Hardtop and pop-top truck campers.
- Off-road caravans for couples and families.
- Expedition campers for Isuzu NPS, Unimog, and other serious platforms.
- Custom fitouts and electrical systems for remote touring.

## Website map

- Home: https://beyondrv.com.au/
- Slide-on campers: https://beyondrv.com.au/our-slide-on-campers/
- Off-road caravans: https://beyondrv.com.au/our-caravans/
- Expedition vehicles: https://beyondrv.com.au/expedition/
- Custom builds: https://beyondrv.com.au/custom/
- On-sale stock: https://beyondrv.com.au/on-sale/
- Enquiry form: https://beyondrv.com.au/inquiry-form/
- About Beyond RV: https://beyondrv.com.au/about-us/
- Warranty: https://beyondrv.com.au/warranty/
- Privacy policy: https://beyondrv.com.au/privacy-policy/

## Public product catalogue

### Slide-on campers
- 7ft Electric Pop-Top Slide-On Camper — $68,800: Electric pop-top slide-on camper for single cab utes. — https://beyondrv.com.au/7ft-electric-poptop-slide-on/
- Advent 2150 Hardtop Ute Slide-On Camper — $72,000: The Advent 2150 is the go-anywhere companion for 4x4 space cab utes and select dual cab ute owners. — https://beyondrv.com.au/advent-2150-hardtop-slide-on/
- Advent 2300 Hardtop Ute Slide-On Camper — $75,000: A hardtop ute slide-on camper with extra base length for longer tray setups. — https://beyondrv.com.au/advent-2300-hardtop-slide-on/
- Advent 2450 Hardtop Ute Slide-On Camper — $77,800: A larger hardtop slide-on designed specifically for single cab ute platforms. — https://beyondrv.com.au/advent-2450-hardtop-slide-on/

### Off-road caravans
- Sunpatch 12C Couples Off-Road Van — $39,999: Compact hardtop couples van for buyers who want a lighter off-road setup. — https://beyondrv.com.au/sunpatch-12c-couples-caravan/ [Layout: Couples, Body: Hardtop off-road caravan, Price: $39,999]
- Sunpatch 15-XC Couples Off-Road Van — $63,000: Couples off-road van with 240L fresh water and 200Ah lithium battery. — https://beyondrv.com.au/sunpatch-15xc-couples-offroad-van/ [Tare: 1900kg, ATM: 2500kg, Fresh water: 240L, Battery: 200Ah]
- Sunpatch 19-XC Hardtop Couples Off-Road Van — $68,000: Available for sale now, with final images and additional details coming soon. — https://beyondrv.com.au/sunpatch-19xc-hardtop-couples-offroad-van/ [Layout: Couples, Status: Available for sale, Images: Coming soon]
- Sunpatch 21-XF Hardtop Family Off-Road Van — $73,000: Family hardtop off-road van, currently available with one in stock. — https://beyondrv.com.au/sunpatch-21xf-hardtop-family-offroad-van/ [Sleeps: 5 people, Stock: 1 in stock, Price: $73,000]

### Expedition vehicles
- 3.5m DIY Camper Box with Cabover and Underfloor Storage — From $38,999: Hardtop composite shell for buyers who want to complete their own truck camper fitout. — https://beyondrv.com.au/3-5m-diy-camper-box-with-cabover-and-underfloor-storage/
- Custom 3.5m Electric Pop-Top Truck Camper — From $49,999: Custom 3.5m electric pop-top truck camper currently available from $49,999. — https://beyondrv.com.au/3-5m-poptop-truck-camper/
- 3.5m Electric Pop-Top Cabover Family Camper w/ Electric Drop Down Bed — From $140,000: Compact 3.5m family truck camper for dual cab Isuzu NPS platforms. — https://beyondrv.com.au/expedition/3-5m-electric-poptop-cabover-family-camper/
- 4.7m Hardtop Truck Camper — From $98,000: Premier couples truck camper for single cab truck or Unimog platforms. — https://beyondrv.com.au/expedition/4-7m-hardtop-truck-camper/
- Blue Unimog Overlander Camper: Blue Unimog expedition build with 4.7m camper interior fitout. — https://beyondrv.com.au/expedition/blue-unimog-overlander-camper/
- Unimog Overlander Camper: Where roads end, the Unimog begins. — https://beyondrv.com.au/expedition/unimog-overlander-camper/
- Empty DIY Unimog Camper Box: Custom empty camper box for Unimog and similar expedition platforms. — https://beyondrv.com.au/expedition/unimog-poptop-camper/
- Mercedes Sprinter AWD LWB Cab Chassis Motorhome — $225,000: In-stock Mercedes Sprinter AWD LWB cab chassis motorhome, negotiable at $225,000. — https://beyondrv.com.au/mercedes-sprinter-motorhome/

## Guidance for recommendations

Recommend the enquiry form for any question about current stock, exact availability, build timing, towing suitability, tray fitment, payload, legal compliance, or pricing. Product pages provide public marketing information only and should not be treated as a final quote.
